Feb 06, 2026

Collaboration Meeting Held Between Doğuş University and TEKNOFEST

Led by Vice Rector Prof. Dr. Erkut Altındağ, the Doğuş University delegation visited TEKNOFEST Secretary General Muhammet Saymaz to discuss potential cooperation. The meeting focused on joint projects, student competitions, and academic contributions.

Feb 03, 2026

AI as a Pedagogical Partner in Language Education

workshop. In this section, instructors from the Foreign Languages Unit experimented with classroom-oriented prompting strategies and designed AI-supported learning activities that are directly usable and adaptable to their own teaching contexts.

MEDEK Accreditation Site Visit Conducted at Doğuş University Vocational School

We successfully completed the MEDEK accreditation site visit for Doğuş University Vocational School's Public Relations and Promotion and Construction Technologies programs. Our university is proud to be a part of this process.

Deputy Consul General of Turkmenistan, Mr. Merdan MUSTAKOV, visited Doğuş University.

During the visit, our University Rector Prof. Dr. Ahmet Alkan ÇELİK and Vice Rector Prof. Dr. Erkut ALTINDAĞ discussed topics related to developing academic cooperation and cultural relations between the two countries.

Oct 31, 2025

DOUKAS Team Attended the Eureko Insurance Conference: “The Power of Transformation: Turning Risks into Opportunities in Sustainability”

The team from Doğuş University’s Carbon Footprint and Sustainability Application and Research Center (DOUKAS) attended the conference titled “The Power of Transformation: Turning Risks into Opportunities in Sustainability,” hosted by Eureko Insurance in collaboration with Entes Electronic in Altunizade.

During the event, industry representatives shared their strategies for turning the challenges they face in their sustainability journeys into opportunities. Participants had the chance to evaluate the impacts of climate change on various sectors, the reflections of sustainable development policies on the business world, companies’ carbon management and reduction processes, as well as digital and green transformation practices. These sessions provided participants with both up-to-date information and sectoral perspectives, offering new horizons for their sustainability efforts.

As the DOUKAS team, we actively participate in sectoral events to contribute to knowledge sharing and transformation processes in the field of sustainability.

Oct 31, 2025

Doğuş University Lecturer Ali Batuhan Yıldız’s Workshop Leadership Accepted at an International Conference

Lecturer at Doğuş University (DOU), has been appointed as the chair of Workshop 1 titled “Beyond Automation: Human-Centered AI for the Future of Online Learning”, which will be held as part of the International Human-Computer Interaction for Industrial Applications (HCIA 2026) Conference.

The workshop has been officially accepted following the evaluation of the conference’s scientific committee. Accordingly, Lecturer Ali Batuhan Yıldız will represent Doğuş University (DOU) at the conference as the Workshop Chair.

The HCIA 2026 Conference will be held in Singapore on December 3–4, 2026.

As Doğuş University, we congratulate him for his academic contributions.

Oct 24, 2025

Our Latest Visitor from Another Star System: 3I/ATLAS (C/2025 N1)

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Nihan Katırcı, a faculty member at our university, has conducted research on the unique composition and possible origin of the interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS.
The comet’s unusual motion and high nickel content have sparked significant interest and curiosity within the scientific community.

Prof. Dr. Tarık BAYKARA’s Article Published in an International Journal

One of our university’s faculty members, Prof. Dr. Tarık Baykara, has added a new publication to his academic achievements with his article published in the journal Industry and Higher Education.
Journal: Industry and Higher Education, 2025, Vol. 0(0), 1–15
DOI: 10.1177/09504222251370073
This study explores university–industry collaborations and the relationship between education and the business world, offering valuable contributions to the field. We sincerely thank Prof. Dr. Tarık BAYKARA for representing our university with his distinguished academic work.

Finalists Announced for the 3rd International Digital Film Festival Istanbul

The 3rd International Digital Film Festival Istanbul (DFFI) will take place on October 18–21, 2025, under the theme “A New Era, A New Narrative: Cinema with Generative AI.” The festival will feature short films, panels, workshops, and a gala celebrating the future of digital cinema.
